title: Dave Inc. Q1 2024 Earnings Report: Record Results and Strong Outlook
text:
Dave reported record first quarter 2024 results with operating revenues reaching $73.6 million, a 25% increase year-over-year. The company achieved GAAP net income of $34.2 million, compared to a loss of $14.0 million in the prior year period.

CEO Jason Wilk stated: 2024 is off to a strong start as we exceeded growth and profitability expectations in the first quarter.

Key Metrics:

Revenue & Profitability:
- Operating revenues: $73.6 million (+25% YoY)
- Adjusted EBITDA: $13.2 million (up 32% from Q4 2023)
- Non-GAAP variable profit margin: 68% (up from 58% YoY)

Operational Highlights:
- Monthly transacting members grew 14% to 2.2 million
- ExtraCash originations increased 32% to $1.1 billion
- Dave Debit Card spend rose 34% to $394 million
- New member acquisition: 566,000 with flat customer acquisition costs
- 28-day delinquency rate improved 77 basis points to 1.83%

2024 Guidance:
Dave raised its full-year 2024 Adjusted EBITDA guidance to $30-$40 million (from the prior $25-$35 million range). Operating revenue guidance remains $305-$325 million, representing 18-25% year-over-year growth. CFO Kyle Beilman noted the company maintains strong financial positioning and requires no additional equity capital.
